_comment: Manual overrides applied after auto-indexing. Keys are component names, values are fields to merge into the indexed entry.

Button.description: Callout/annotation button for informational messages (info, tip, caution, warning). NOT for user actions — use ContainedButton, OutlinedButton, or TextButton instead.

ContainedButton.description: Primary action button with a solid filled background. Use for the main call-to-action on a page (e.g., Submit, Sign in, Get started).

OutlinedButton.description: Secondary action button with an outlined border and no fill. Use for secondary actions alongside a ContainedButton.

TextButton.description: Tertiary action button with no border or fill, styled as text. Use for low-emphasis actions (e.g., Cancel, Skip).

ContainedLink.description: Primary navigation link styled as a filled button. Use when navigating to another page/URL with a prominent CTA appearance.

OutlinedLink.description: Secondary navigation link styled as an outlined button. Use for less prominent navigation actions.

TextLink.description: Tertiary navigation link styled as a text button. Use for low-emphasis navigation.
